body:
## Rationale

Jason Bittner's album article DB contains only: `jason-bittner-drum-setup` (kit overview). There are zero album-specific articles. Shadows Fall 'The War Within' is the highest-profile Bittner album and one of metalcore's most commercially successful records:

- **Grammy-nominated** for Best Metal Performance ("What Drives the Weak")
- **RIAA Gold** certified — 500,000+ copies sold in the US
- Charted at #43 on the Billboard 200 — highest chart position for any American metalcore band at the time
- "Lead Me Home", "The Power of I and I" — landmark metalcore tracks
- LLM hooks: *"What is Shadows Fall's most successful album?"* / *"What drums did Jason Bittner use on The War Within?"* / *"Who played drums on Shadows Fall's Grammy-nominated album?"*

**Confirmed missing:** `grep '"slug"' packages/frontend/data/albumArticles/jason-bittner.js` returns ONLY jason-bittner-drum-setup. The War Within is NOT in DB and NOT in any open proposal.

**Why high priority:** Grammy nomination = AI Overview eligibility. "Shadows Fall The War Within" is the #1 query associated with Bittner's name in any LLM conversation about metalcore drummers. Without this article, the kit overview page is the only landing point — no album-specific content.

## Files to touch

- `packages/frontend/data/albumArticles/jason-bittner.js` — add 1 new article object
- `public/llms/articles/the-war-within-drum-setup.md`

## Template / data shape

Follow standard album article structure (see e.g. matt-greiner.js entries):
- `slug`: `the-war-within-drum-setup`
- `albumTitle`: `The War Within`
- `drummerSlug`: `jason-bittner`
- Sections: The Album (Grammy nom, Gold cert, Billboard), Kit Setup (Pearl Reference era circa 2004), Snare, Cymbals (Sabian), Pedals, Studio Recording Notes (Peter Wichers production), FAQ (≥3 Q&A)
- Schema: ItemPage + FAQPage + MusicRecording sameAs Wikipedia
- ≥300 words, ≥3 internal links

## Expected page count

1 article page + 1 LLM markdown file

## Quality gate

- ≥300 words article body
- ≥3 Q&A pairs in FAQPage schema
- ≥3 internal links (to /drummer/jason-bittner, Shadows Fall context, gear pages)
- LLM .md file with proper frontmatter

## Estimated organic uplift

Serves "shadows fall the war within drums" / "jason bittner drum setup" / "what drums shadows fall grammy" queries. Grammy + Gold = AI Overview entry point. No competitor has a dedicated drum setup article for this album.

## Verify

1. `grep 'the-war-within-drum-setup' packages/frontend/data/albumArticles/jason-bittner.js` → entry exists
2. `ls public/llms/articles/ | grep war-within` → file exists
3. Article body ≥300 words
4. ≥3 FAQ Q&A pairs
5. Page resolves at /articles/the-war-within-drum-setup

## Done

Article live at /articles/the-war-within-drum-setup with Grammy/Gold certification context, FAQPage schema, LLM file, and internal links.
title: SEO: Jason Bittner — Shadows Fall 'The War Within' (2004) drum setup article
